name: Suez Canal
climate: Hyper-arid desert; hot summers with minimal rainfall; mild winters; occasional sandstorms

neighbors.name: Red Sea
neighbors.relevance: Southern approach; all Suez-bound traffic transits the Red Sea

neighbors.name: Mediterranean
neighbors.relevance: Northern exit; Suez connects Red Sea to Mediterranean shipping lanes

neighbors.name: Levant
neighbors.relevance: Eastern neighbor across Sinai; Israel and Jordan are adjacent to the canal zone

neighbors.name: Horn of Africa
neighbors.relevance: Bab el-Mandeb security at the Red Sea's southern end affects Suez traffic volume

links.description: Suez Canal is the northern terminus of the Red Sea shipping lane
Canal connects Red Sea to Mediterranean, enabling Asia-Europe trade without circumnavigating Africa
Gulf oil exits Hormuz, crosses Arabian Sea and Red Sea, then transits Suez to reach Europe
Cape route is the primary alternative when Suez or Red Sea is disrupted
Competing intercontinental trade route; Suez handles Asia-Europe, Panama handles Asia-US East Coast
Asia-Europe container route runs Malacca to Red Sea to Suez
Black Sea grain exports transit Bosphorus then may use Suez for Asian markets
